sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23377" key="damasth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δᾰμασ-τής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n23377.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">subduer, Gloss.,</tr_> prob. epith. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ἔρως,</foreign> [<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> </bibl>]<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:301" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">301</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
